title: pilosella collina
intro: Pilosella collina, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis, skin conditions, and digestive problems, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Pilosella collina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal benefits.
